releases.name: S-Calc 0.6.0

releases.author: Abdulkader-Safi
releases.description:
First release of S-Calc, a calculator you write inside a note.

Put expressions in an `s-calc` code block and each line's result appears flush-right on the line, in your theme accent color, updating live as you type.

## Features
- Arithmetic with parentheses
- Labels and variables (`Price: 10`, then reuse `Price`)
- `sum` (running total above) and `prev` (previous result)
- Percentages: `120 - 15%`, `20% of 30`, `20% of what is 30`
- Units and conversion: `20 ml in tea spoons`, `2 kg in lb`
- Live currency conversion for every currency the rate feed returns (`4 GBP in Euro`, `50 KWD in LBP`)
- Natural-language dates: `next friday + 2 weeks`, `today + 90 days`

## Install manually
Copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/s-calc/`, then enable S-Calc in Settings, Community plugins.
releases.name: S-Calc 0.5.0
